{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[armour]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following onto a relevant armour page.

<pre>{{Infobox Armour
|power = 
|meleedefence = 
|rangeddefence = 
|magicdefence = 
|durability = 
|setbonus1 = 
|setbonus2 = 
|setbonus3 = 
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===power===
The armour power level.

===meleedefence===
The melee defence stat of the armour.

===rangeddefence===
The ranged defence stat of the armour.

===magicdefence===
The magic defence stat of the armour.

===durability===
The maximum durability of the armour.

===setbonus===
The armour set bonuses that 1, 2 or 3 parts of the armour give.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"power": {
			"label": "Power level",
			"description": "The armour power level.",
			"example": "1",
			"type": "number",
            "suggested": true
		},	
		"meleedefence": {
			"label": "Melee defence",
			"description": "The melee defence stat of the armour.",
			"example": "+8",
			"type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"rangeddefence": {
			"label": "Ranged defence",
			"description": "The ranged defence stat of the armour.",
			"example": "+8",
            "type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"magicdefence": {
			"label": "Magic defence",
			"description": "The magic defence stat of the armour.",
			"example": "+8",
            "type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"durability": {
			"label": "Durability",
			"description": "The maximum durability of the armour.",
			"example": "500",
			"type": "number",
            "suggested": true
		},
        "setbonus1": {
			"aliases": ["setbonus2", "setbonus3"],
			"label": "Set bonus",
			"description": "The armour set bonuses that 1, 2 or 3 parts of the armour give.",
			"example": "-33% Block Stamina Cost",
            "type": "string",
            "suggested": true
        }
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a piece of armour.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"power",
		"meleedefence",
		"rangeddefence",
		"magicdefence",
		"durability",
        "setbonus1"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Armour]]</includeonly>
